counters.description: stay away from minions as he will use e to hit you and your adc for free poke. if he misses his stun you have a window to go in and punish.
lux is really strong and will make sure you know it if you give her the space. don't get hit by her spells and try to punish her if she misses her q.
maokai is really overtuned as of late and will be really effective at roaming or killing your adc in lane. it's quite difficult to peel him off because of his w making him untargetable.
black shield does not allow any fun... look for fights if she wastes her e in lane.
do not underestimate namis damage, punish her if she misses her q, but don't over commit, her lane partner might chase you down with the slows from nami.
his hook is faster than yours so he can hook you reactively. care for his kill pressure so don't roam for too long.
pyke is very slippery and will also roam faster than you. try to punish the enemy adc when he leaves and be aware that he has the tools to do the same to your adc if you leave for too long.

ever since she escaped your lantern she's been a bit of a nuisance. punish her if she goes too deep for her passive stacks and care for her q through minions. if she kills a minion with her w it also immediately roots around it.
care for his healing with r, and punish him if he misses his e.
this fabulous man scales very hard and is still fairly strong in early fights (if he has the mana). punish his e if missed and hope he burns through a lot of mana to recover.
punish him when he enters your range and misses his stun. your cc will cancel his r.
a lot of poke and can use plants to block your hooks.

synergies.description: aphelios really struggles due to his lack of mobilty so your lantern can really help make up for that.
she makes it easier for you to hit your cc, but then isn't able to capitalize on it due to her lack of damage.
try to drag the enemy into her w and you will probably win the trade.
draven enjoys playing with someone with strong pick potential. be proactive and help him snowball his lead.

in lane you're not a good duo, but ezreal is one of the safest adcs to leave alone when roaming due to his mobility. just don't overdo, he might get forced away from your tower causing him to lose cs.
hwei wants to poke in lane and you can keep him safe while, but if you land hooks in lane he can really unleash tons of damage and followup with some of his own cc.
your cc compliments each other really well, just make sure not to flay the enemy away from jhins w.
very good duo, your cc leads into her traps and your lantern can drag her to safety to cover for her lack of mobility.
kai'sa really thrives with a support with good cc. she also has really good followup with her r.
very strong early game duo. consider putting some extra points into e for some very strong aa trades combined with kalistas w.
very weak early, very low mobility so he's easy to punish when you roam to other lanes.
despite your "disagreements" you're a really strong duo. lean into your early game power and snowball it.
decent presence in early game and you can lock someone down inside of her r for a lot of damage.
if you actually get into a game with a nilah then you can do a lot of damage early on and help her snowball.
very good adc when combined with strong cc, she also snowballs really well.
if your adc wants to play fasting i'd recommend playing a different support (or even a toplane tank).
don't really want to fight early when your adc throws toy boomerangs.
you are very strong early as your cc almost guarantees that tristana can fully stack her e. she is also quite safe alone when roaming.
i don't care for this sewer rat. always permabanned.
if he goes on-hit or crit it's a quite good duo, but i think lethality doesn't do very well with a thresh support.
vayne is not as terrible early game as she was before, but she is still really weak early on.
really strong with your cc enabling her to stack a bunch of feathers behind your target. just make sure not to flay the enemy away from her feathers.
zeri and thresh are not really able to make each other shine.
aphelios really struggles due to his lack of mobilty so your lantern can really help make up for that.
she makes it easier for you to hit your cc, but then isn't able to capitalize on it due to her lack of damage.
try to drag the enemy into her w and you will probably win the trade.
